title: Kanban Plan — regenerate cognize fixtures from real fetch
description: Replace synthetic cognize movies fixture with real fetched movies data from Naberezhnye Chelny source configured in .env.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Use live fetch output to build tests fixtures for ct-cognetive

DONE.notes: Companion file to raw movies fixture
DONE.status_note: Completed: added tests/fixtures/cognize_movies.fetch.meta.json with source_url, fetched_at and movies_count.

DONE.task: Run ct-cognetive on regenerated fixture and verify JSON output
DONE.notes: Ensure fixture quality is suitable for isolated CLI test
DONE.status_note: Completed: ct-cognetive ran successfully on updated fixture; output /tmp/cog.fixture.realfetch.json with 38 analyzed movies.

DONE.task: Fetch real movies for naberezhnie-chelni and replace tests/fixtures/cognize_movies.raw.json
DONE.status_note: Completed: regenerated fixture via ct-fetch --city naberezhnie-chelni --when now (38 movies).
